data.title: Russia to recognize crypto as ‘currency asset’ and open market for all investors
data.description:
Russian authorities intend to treat cryptocurrencies and stablecoins as “currency assets,” according to the Bank of Russia’s new plan for complete regulation of the market. For the first time, the monetary authority is now proposing to significantly expand investor access to decentralized digital money, although not without fine print. Russian regulators open door for cryptocurrency […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-to-recognize-crypto-as-currency-asset/

data.title: China’s rising exports to Germany widen deficit to record levels
data.description:
Germany’s trade deficit with China is heading toward a record in 2025 as demand for German products keeps shrinking. Analysts tracking trade flows say the gap is widening fast and shows no sign of easing soon. If the trend holds, it could fuel protectionist pressure inside Europe’s largest economy at a time when political patience […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinas-rising-exports-germany-widen-deficit/

data.title: Bitcoin May Stay Outside Central Bank Vaults, Billionaire Says
data.description:
According to recent interviews, billionaire investor Ray Dalio has sharpened his caution about Bitcoin’s fit for official reserves while still recognizing its scarce nature. Related Reading: Before You Sell Bitcoin For Gold, Hear This Warning He said that Bitcoin carries money-like qualities because of its limited supply, but he drew a firm line over who should hold it on a balance sheet. Dalio said public transaction records and the risk of outside interference make it hard for reserve managers to treat Bitcoin the same way they treat gold. Dalio Flags Traceability Concerns Dalio warned that the open ledger that underpins Bitcoin creates vulnerabilities for large custodians
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-may-stay-outside-central-bank-vaults-billionaire-says/

data.title: EU Backs Digital Euro Holding Caps to Protect Banking Stability
data.description:
The Council of the European Union has formally backed the European Central Bank’s proposal to impose caps on individual holdings of a future digital euro, marking a key step forward in shaping the legal framework for the central bank digital currency.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/eu-backs-digital-euro-holding-caps-to-protect-banking-stability/

data.title: Circle: The circulating supply of the Euro stablecoin EURC has exceeded 300 million.
data.description: Stablecoin issuer Circle released data on its X platform showing that the circulating supply of its euro stablecoin EURC has now exceeded 300 million, and market demand for euro stablecoins that meet MiCA standards, are fully reserved, and can be used globally is growing.

data.title: Upexi Files $1 Billion Shelf Registration with SEC
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Upexi, a publicly traded company on the U.S. stock market, has submitted a $1 billion shelf registration to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The company aims to raise funds through various securities offerings. Upexi currently holds approximately 2 million SOL tokens, making it the fourth-largest SOL asset holder among publicly listed companies. The potential proceeds from this fundraising could be allocated for various purposes, including working capital, research and development, and debt repayment.

Upexi's stock price has experienced a significant decline, dropping from a peak of $22.57 in May to $1.825. The stock saw an additional 8.3% decrease today, bringing the company's market capitalization to $115 million.

data.title: Atlanta Fed Projects 3% Growth for U.S. Fourth Quarter GDP
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta has released its initial forecast for the United States' GDP in the fourth quarter, predicting a growth rate of 3%.

data.title: SOL Treasury Company Upexi filed Form S-3 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a $1 billion shelf registration application.
data.description: Upexi, the US-listed Solana crypto treasury (DAT) company, plans to file for a $1 billion shelf registration with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Form S-3 to raise funds through various securities offerings. Upexi stated that this adjustment will improve the company's fundraising efficiency and reduce overall transaction costs through more flexible timing and pricing mechanisms, thereby supporting its Solana asset management strategy. Currently, the company holds approximately 2 million SOL tokens, making it the fourth-largest SOL holder among publicly traded companies. The potential proceeds can be used for various purposes, including working capital, research and development, and debt repayment. Once the registration statement becomes effective, the company will use the mechanism in accordance with management's judgment, provided it is beneficial to the adjusted value per Solana. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Solana Hovers at Key Support as the Market Starts to Hesitate
data.description:
Solana is trading around $122. 9, sitting right on a zone that has started to matter again. After days of steady downside pressure, price is no longer accelerating lower. Instead, it’s slowing down, compressing, and reacting more cautiously around this level
source: https://www.ethnews.com/solana-hovers-at-key-support-as-the-market-starts-to-hesitate/

data.title: Japan to launch investigation into AI search services Google, Microsoft
data.description:
The Japan Fair Trade Commission plans to conduct a fact-finding investigation into search engines that use generative artificial intelligence. It is expected to target companies such as Japanese tech giant LY Corp. and US firms Google and Microsoft. Japan’s antitrust watchdog suspects that the unauthorized use of articles from news organizations by IT companies in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-to-launch-investigation-into-ai-search/

data.title: BitMine Acquires Additional Ethereum Through BitGo
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, BitMine-associated addresses have purchased 6,678 ETH via BitGo, valued at $19.63 million. This transaction highlights ongoing activity in the cryptocurrency market, with BitMine continuing to expand its holdings.
